inputs.titre: Foundation of the Order of Beghards

reason: The image depicts a group of people in what appears to be a medieval or early Renaissance setting. They are wearing simple, hooded robes and holding candles, suggesting a religious or monastic order. The architecture and the lack of modern technology are consistent with the 13th century. The presence of glass candle holders might be a slight anachronism. The windows shape and the construction of the room appears correct. The picture matches the suggested description.
